title: WAL 重放后等于崩溃前已提交状态
description: 证明 WAL 重放后数据库状态等于崩溃前所有已提交事务的状态。

evidence.test_results: cargo test -p sqlrustgo-storage wal: 11 passed; cargo test -p sqlrustgo-transaction: 14 passed
evidence.verification_method: TLA+ 模型检测 + Rust集成测试验证 (TLA+工具待安装)

formal_verification.verify_command: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/workspace tlatools/tlatools tlc -workers auto docs/proof/PROOF-003-wal-recovery.tla

author: openclaw
